question: List the names of members that are not club leaders.
sql: SELECT Name FROM member WHERE Member_ID NOT IN (SELECT Member_ID FROM club_leader);

back_translation.intent: 查询非俱乐部领导的成员姓名
filters: Member_ID NOT IN (SELECT Member_ID FROM club_leader)

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致，均要求获取非俱乐部领导成员的姓名，通过Member_ID不在club_leader表中的条件过滤，无额外聚合/分组/排序要求
